query: Identify publishers with declining spend from Q3 to Q4 2024. Show publishers where Q4 spend is less than Q3 spend.
gold_sql: WITH quarterly_spend AS (SELECT publisher, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS q_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND fiscal_quarter IN (3, 4) GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter) SELECT DISTINCT q3.publisher FROM quarterly_spend q3 JOIN quarterly_spend q4 ON q3.publisher = q4.publisher WHERE q3.fiscal_quarter = 3 AND q4.fiscal_quarter = 4 AND q4.q_spend < q3.q_spend
